parameters.jsCode:
return { json: {
  inquiry_type: $json.inquiry_type,
  requested_booking_date: $json.requested_booking_date,
  requested_booking_time: $json.requested_booking_time,
  booking_duration_minutes: $json.booking_duration_minutes || null,
  booking_calendar: $json.booking_calendar || null,
  booking_details_complete: $json.booking_details_complete ?? null,
  booking_needs_confirmation: $json.booking_needs_confirmation ?? null,
  booking_email_subject: $json.booking_email_subject || null,
  booking_email_body: $json.booking_email_body || null,
  booking_task_payload: $json.booking_task_payload || null,
  apple_calendar_payload: $json.apple_calendar_payload || null,
  apple_calendar_wrapper_script: $json.apple_calendar_wrapper_script || null,
  urgent_task_payload: $json.urgent_task_payload || null,
  urgent_telegram_message: $json.urgent_telegram_message || null,
  note: 'DRAFT FRAME ONLY — not activated, not tested, no side effects wired yet.'
} };
